statements: I am the Plaintiff in this action and entered into the written contract attached as Exhibit A with the Defendant on or about January 5, 2025.
The Defendant did not complete the work described in the contract, and the photographs attached as Exhibit B fairly and accurately depict the condition of the property on February 10, 2026.
I paid the Defendant the sum of $24,500 under the contract, and the Defendant has not refunded any portion of that amount.
